sections.paragraph:
verb לגדול

to grow; increase; rise (in status) ; mature

verb לגדל

to rear, grow, breed; raise; praise

verb גודל

be reared, grown, bred; educated

verb להתגדל

to boast; rise; increase; be educated

verb להגדיל

to enlarge, increase; do magnificent deeds

verb הוגדל

be enlarged, increased, magnified

verb לגדל (>>גידל)

to rear, grow, breed; raise; praise

adjective גדול

great, large, big, huge; strong; rich; grand

adjective

growing, increasing, rising

masculine noun גודל

size, magnitude, extent, enormity, immensity, largeness, bulk; magnificence, amplitude; quantity
